title: Rick's Fever Dream
description: Weird and powerful entities, OP swords and tools, a lot of dungeons and so much more!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c39162516b3d987844a00a95f9af80f71ca301d.png)

Welcome to the official page of Rick's Fever Dream!

"**_Rick's Fever Dream_**" is a Minecraft mod that transforms the boring basic world into a chaotic one full of powerful and weird creatures. Discover new ores, craft unique armors and find powerful tools.

Rick's Fever Dream draws inspiration from classics like OreSpawn and MoreCreepsAndWeirdos and will take you back to the fun, quirky, and strange early mods while making sure that all features fit to Minecraft's original aesthetic. 

At the moment this project is still in beta, so i suggest you to NOT try this mod in your main world. 
Feel free to add this mod to your pack, no need to ask for permission :)

This page will be updated in the future with more pictures, details and with an official guide!



Beta 1.4 Features:

- 2 Custom Ore
- 3 Armor sets
- 2 Modeled OP Sword
- 28 Creatures
- 2 Boss
- 7 Structures
- 33 Items

Required Dependencies:

Geckolib



Made with MCreator, this doesn't mean that is bugged or low-effort. A lot of parts are manually coded to be more optimized and less buggy. Tested with more than 300 mods and found no incompatibility!!

I'm open to any type of feedback or advice (:



Check out the official [Discord](https://discord.gg/57pkMv7VEK)

If you want to support this huge project you can do it here: my [Ko-Fi page](https://ko-fi.com/ricksfeverdream)
